title: broadcast_to_group: O(C*M) member lookup should be O(C+M)
description: state.rs:207 — broadcast_to_group iterates all C connected clients and calls members.contains(&pub_id) which is O(M) vec scan per client, totaling O(C*M). At C=10000, M=100 each GROUP_SEND scans 1M strings before any network I/O. Fix: convert members slice to HashSet before the outer iteration; contains becomes O(1), total becomes O(C+M).
